solo builder monetization via AI tools

worthClicking.author: @gdb
worthClicking.why: Greg Brockman announcing GPT-5.5 API availability directly — the primary source, not a demo clip.

worthClicking.author: @kimmonismus
worthClicking.why: GLM-5.1 on BytePlus at 5x lower cost than official pricing with Cursor/Claude Code native integration is a real pricing disruption worth tracking for build vs. buy decisions.

worthClicking.author: @kimmonismus
worthClicking.why: DeepSeek publicly mocking Anthropic's Claude is a notable competitive signal about brand damage from the pricing blunder.

worthClicking.author: @DataChaz
worthClicking.why: 4-minute Karpathy clip arguing Claude Skills, MCP, and agents are past hype and now the baseline — concise signal for where the floor is moving.

worthClicking.author: @aakashgupta
worthClicking.why: The claim that developers got 10x acceleration from AI while designers got 1.5-2x names the concrete bottleneck that will shape AI product team structure.

worthClicking.author: @aakashgupta
worthClicking.why: Clean 4-component agent architecture framework (intelligence, memory, tools, orchestration) is the kind of mental model useful for evaluating agent product designs.

worthClicking.author: @RoundtableSpace
worthClicking.why: Solo creator making $127K building Fortnite maps with no code or team is a concrete indie distribution case study, not just hype.

voices.why: Closest ground-level view on Chinese model pricing and capability moves; the GLM-5.1/BytePlus and DeepSeek mockery posts are both genuinely useful competitive intel.
Consistently covers AI PM role evolution and system design bar — relevant to AI product strategy — but buries signal in heavy post volume and off-topic content.
Primary source for OpenAI API launches; low post volume, high information density when he does post.

examples: @aakashgupta mass-posting newsletter CTAs (10+ identical 'subscribe to my newsletter' posts)
@RoundtableSpace all-caps hype videos of GPT-5.5 demo clips with no analytical value
off-topic viral content (orca brain facts, NASA scientist death, running biomechanics, willow trees)
